mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys02_user WHERE sys02_company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY sys02_kor_nm
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys02_user (sys02_company_id, sys02_kor_nm, sys02_login_id, sys02_email, sys02_note, sys02_admin_yn, sys02_tel1, sys02_tel2) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{korName}, #{loginId}, #{email}, #{note}, #{adminYn}, #{telNo01}, #{telNo02})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys02_user SET sys02_kor_nm = #{korName}, sys02_email = #{email}, sys02_note = #{note}, sys02_admin_yn = #{adminYn}, sys02_tel1 = #{telNo01}, sys02_tel2 = #{telNo02} WHERE sys02_user_id = #{userId}
